body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
fix benchmark instability

The default solver used in ClimaAtmos changed with last week's release. We need to keep using ARS343 with diagnostic EDMF for stability, so we change it back here

passing benchmark run https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-cpu-gpu-benchmarks/builds/170
title: use ARS343 for diag EDMF benchmarks
